mission.title: argo-workflows: Allow setting workflow parameter values using ConfigMap
mission.description: Allow setting workflow parameter values using ConfigMap. Requested by 32+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-workflows deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
helm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-workflows installation.

steps.title: Review argo-workflows configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
There is currently no way to set a workflow parameter value (for both global `spec.arguments.parameters` and `steps[].arguments.parameters`) using the `valueFrom.configMapKeyRef` construct in the same way `env` variables can be defined.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Allow setting workflow parameter values using ConfigMap
steps.description:
Use a resource template to read ConfigMap values and pass them as workflow parameters. The `valueFrom` field only works for output parameters, so use a two-step approach:
```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: environment-config
  namespace: worker
data:
  docker.registry: '123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-west-1.amazonaws.com'
```
Then use a `resource` template to get the value and pass it as an output parameter to subsequent steps.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Allow setting workflow parameter values using ConfigMap" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Use a resource template with action: get to read ConfigMap values at runtime and pass them as output parameters to subsequent steps. Direct valueFrom.configMapKeyRef is not supported for workflow argument parameters.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: environment-config
  namespace: worker
data:
  docker.registry: '123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-west-1.amazonaws.com'

apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Workflow
metadata:
  generateName: myworkflow-
spec:
  entrypoint: step1
  arguments:
    parameters:
    - name: registry
      valueFrom:
        configMapKeyRef:
          name: environment-config
          key: docker.registry
  templates:
  - name: step1
    container:
      image: '{{workflow.parameters.registry}}/step1:latest'
      command: [./start.sh]

apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Workflow
metadata:
  generateName: get-cm-value-
spec:
  entrypoint: entry

  templates:
    - name: entry
      steps:
        - - name: get-cm-value
            template: get-cm-value
        - - name: use-cm-value
            template: use-cm-value
            arguments:
              parameters:
                - name: docker-val
                  value: "{{steps.get-cm-value.outputs.parameters.docker-val}}"

    - name: get-cm-value
      resource:
        action: get
        manifest: |
          apiVersion: v1
          kind: ConfigMap
          metadata:
            name: environment-config
      outputs:
        parameters:
          - name: docker-val
            valueFrom:
              jsonPath: '{.data.docker\.registry}'

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible.
